/faqs.html_ready:
<!-- Schema 1 -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "name": "Frequently Asked Questions — WorkEZ Managed Offices",
  "description": "Answers to common questions about WorkEZ managed office spaces, pricing, amenities, locations and booking.",
  "url": "https://workez.in/faqs",
  "mainEntity": [
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "What is a managed office space?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "A managed office space is a fully furnished, plug-and-play workspace where all operations — IT infrastructure, housekeeping, security, maintenance — are handled by the provider. WorkEZ offers enterprise-grade managed offices across Chennai, Bangalore and Coimbatore with flexible terms."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "How is WorkEZ different from a coworking space?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Unlike open coworking, WorkEZ provides dedicated, private managed offices with custom branding, private access control, dedicated IT infrastructure, and enterprise-level SLAs. Your workspace is exclusively yours — not shared with other companies."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "What cities and locations does WorkEZ operate in?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "WorkEZ operates 12 centres across 3 cities: Chennai (10 centres in Anna Salai, Guindy, Perungudi, OMR, Pallavaram, Velachery, and Alwarpet), Bangalore (Bellandur near Outer Ring Road), and Coimbatore (Saravanampatti IT corridor)."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "What is the minimum seat count and lock-in period?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Minimum seat counts and lock-in periods vary by centre and configuration. We offer flexible terms for teams ranging from 5 seats to 500+. Contact our team or book a free tour for a customised proposal."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "What amenities are included?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "All WorkEZ centres include high-speed fibre internet (primary + backup), fully furnished workstations, meeting rooms, conference rooms, cafeteria/pantry, 24/7 access, power backup (DG + UPS), CCTV security, housekeeping, and reception services. Premium centres include breakout zones, phone booths, and event spaces."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Can I book a tour before signing up?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Absolutely. You can schedule a free, no-obligation tour at any WorkEZ centre via our Book a Tour page at workez.in/book-a-tour or by calling us directly."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "How quickly can I move in?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "WorkEZ managed offices are plug-and-play. Once terms are agreed, most setups are ready within 7-14 working days. For standard configurations, move-in can happen within 48 hours."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Does WorkEZ offer customisation of the workspace?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Yes. Enterprise clients can customise their workspace with branded signage, custom furniture layouts, dedicated meeting rooms, and specialised IT infrastructure. Our team handles the fit-out so you can focus on your business."
      }
    }
  ]
}
</script>
